resultList.dtldesc: Enter your dream house with this welcoming 2 BHK flat for sale in the desirable location of Royapettah, Chennai. Built to be Vaastu friendly, it promises a healthy living atmosphere and peace of mind. East-facing architecture, which receives sunlight throughout the day, brings smiles to your face every morning. Property SpecificationsThis large 2 BHK apartment has a super area of 720 sqft and is situated on the 3rd floor of a clean and well-kept 4-story building. The apartment is unfurnished and has two bedrooms and two bathroomsone attached to the master bedroom and the other as a common bathroom. Both bathrooms have a Western theme and are fitted with geysers to provide more convenience.The design features a living cum dining space, allowing ample areas for resting and congregating. The kitchen is standard in design with a piped gas supply, accompanied by a utility space that is conveniently added as an attachment. There is an attached balcony with a beautiful road view, adding to the value of living. The flooring of the flat is done in vitrified tiles, providing strength as well as trendy looks.FacilitiesFacilities-wise, the complex features covered parking for motorcycles to keep your car safe. There is a 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup to ensure that life is not interrupted. For security measures, there is a guard on duty, and CCTVs are provided on all areas of the complex. Furthermore, there is a single lift in the building for the convenience of accessing all floors.LocalityLocated in the neighborhood of Royapettah, this property has the advantage of being close to necessary amenities. Hospitals are readily accessible within easy reach, which guarantees prompt access to medical care. Schools are situated within the distance of 200 meters whereas malls and supermarkets are situated in the vicinity. Public transportation is readily accessible, with autos and buses readily available, and the Royapettah metro station merely 500 meters away, improving connectivity to the rest of the city. Banks and ATM facilities are within walking distance, further enhancing the convenience of this prime spot.
